description: Query your MCPSpend usage: cost today, top tools, recent sessions, budget projections.
name: io.github.andreisirbu91-lab/mcpspend

environmentVariables.description: Your MCPSpend API key. Create one at https://mcpspend.com/dashboard/keys. Starts with mcps_live_ or mcps_test_. Optional — the server boots and lists tools without it; only tool calls require auth.
environmentVariables.name: MCPSPEND_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the MCPSpend API endpoint. Defaults to https://api.mcpspend.com. Use only if you self-host MCPSpend.
environmentVariables.name: MCPSPEND_ENDPOINT
